title: Brute Force Attack on SSH
description: An analysis of an attempted SSH brute-force attack, including log identification, timeline of events, and mitigation steps taken.

details.scenario: Multiple failed SSH login attempts from a single IP address were detected in the auth.log file.
details.analysis: Identified 500+ failed attempts within 10 minutes. The attacker was targeting common usernames like 'admin', 'root', and 'user'.
details.action: Implemented fail2ban to automatically ban IPs after 5 failed attempts and disabled password authentication in favor of SSH keys.
details.outcome: Successful mitigation of the attack and improved server security posture.

title: Detection Rule for Ransomware Activity
description: Creation and documentation of a Sigma rule to detect common ransomware file extension changes.

details.rationale: Ransomware often renames large numbers of files quickly. Detecting this pattern can trigger an early alert.
details.implementation: Deployed to the SIEM to monitor File System events across critical servers.

title: Analyzing the Log4j Vulnerability
description: Turning the Log4j (CVE-2021-44228) threat report into actionable defensive steps for an enterprise environment.

details.summary: Log4j allows remote code execution via a specially crafted string in logs.
actions: Identified all internal applications using Log4j.
Implemented WAF rules to block JNDI lookup strings.

title: From Low-Privileged User to Domain Admin
description: A step-by-step documentation of an attack path in an Active Directory environment, showing how misconfigurations lead to full compromise.

details.step_1: Initial access gained via phished credentials.
details.step_2: Enumerated the domain and identified Kerberoastable service accounts.
details.step_3: Cracked the service account password and used it to escalate to Domain Admin via a misconfigured GPO.

title: AWS S3 Bucket Misconfiguration
description: Investigating the security impact of an exposed S3 bucket and explaining how it could lead to data exfiltration.

details.discovery: Found a public-facing S3 bucket containing sensitive customer data.
details.impact: Potential GDPR violation and loss of brand reputation.
details.resolution: Enforced 'Block Public Access' at the account level and implemented IAM policies with least privilege.

title: Zero Trust Architecture for Remote Work
description: A proposal for moving from a traditional VPN-based remote access model to a Zero Trust approach.

details.current_state: Users connect via VPN and have broad network access.
details.proposed_state: Implement Identity-Aware Proxy (IAP) and MFA for every application access.
details.benefit: Reduction of lateral movement risk and improved visibility.

title: Blue - TryHackMe
description: Exploiting the EternalBlue vulnerability (MS17-010) on a Windows 7 machine.
